creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this on your things-to-do this winter list!

Public pop-up at the Museum of the Future is a lovely al fresco dining spot this winter season in Dubai. We went there for breakfast on Christmas day, and it was perfect! No waiting time, great ambience, delicious food, friendly service! 

🍽️ Here are the dishes we had:
Truffle and Eggpuff: 67 AED
Shakshuka Bolognese: 62 AED
Tiramisu: 43 AED 

🍳Breakfast Timings: 9 AM to 1 PM daily
🕘 Open until 12 AM on weekdays, until 1 AM on weekends.
📲 Reserve your table @public Instagram page.
